AlphaDIA: **normalization_method** setting in the config; mapped to `DirectLFQ` if the value is `directlfq`, else left as-is
AlphaPept: Fixed to `None` — AlphaPept has no normalization step
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: **--no-norm** → `None`; **--global-norm** → `Global normalization`; **--sig-norm** → `RT & signal-dep. normalization`;
otherwise `RT-dependent normalization`.\*
--cfg: additionally forced to `None` if the log contains **Normalisation disabled**
FragPipe:
If not DIA-NN quant, parsed from **ionquant.normalization**
if DIA-NN quant, not parsed
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed from **normalize** from the json file (coerced to bool)
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **mcqr_normalization_method** (both X!Tandem and Sage paths)

AlphaDIA: **missed_cleavages** setting in **library_prediction** section of the config
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--missed-cleavages**
--cfg: parsed from line **Maximum number of missed cleavages set to X**
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.allowed_missed_cleavage_1**
MSAngel:
Parsed from **ERRORTOLERANT** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used\*
Parsed from **nMissedCleavages** in **digestionParameters** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Max Missed Cleavage: X**
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **max_missed_cleavages** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **allowed_missed_cleavages** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **missed_cleavages** in the **database[enzyme]** section in the config
i2MassChroQ:
If X!Tandem: parsed from **scoring, maximum missed cleavage sites**, overridden by **refine, maximum missed cleavage sites** if **refine** = `"yes"`
if Sage: parsed from **sage_database_enzyme_missed_cleavages**

AlphaDIA: Set to True if **mbr_step_enabled** is True, else False
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: True if **--reanalyse** is set, else false
--cfg: True if **reanalyse them** (version <1.8) or **MBR enabled** (version >1.8) is mentioned
FragPipe:
If **quantitation.run-label-free-quant** is true, parsed from **ionquant.mbr**
if DIA-NN (**diann.run-dia-nn** true), true if **--reanalyse** appears in **diann.fragpipe.cmd-opts** or **diann.cmd-opts**, or if **diann.mbr** is true
MSAID*: True if **Quan in all file** or **MBR** is found in **quantification_method**
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Match Between Run: X**
ProlineStudio: Set to true if **cross assignment** is present in the rows of the **Quant config** sheet, else False
QuantMS: Not parsed
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **mcq_mbr**

AlphaDIA: **enzyme** setting in **library_prediction** section of the config
AlphaPept: **protease** in **fasta** section of the config; `trypsin` normalized to `Trypsin`
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--cut** (if absent entirely, defaults to `Trypsin/P`; a bare **--cut** flag with
no value means no-digestion mode → `No digestion`); `K*,R*`/`K*,R*,!P` normalized to `Trypsin/P`/`Trypsin`
--cfg: reconstructed from lines **In silico digest will involve cuts at X** and **But excluding cuts at X**,
then normalized the same way
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.search_enzyme_name_1** and **msfragger.search_enzyme_name_2**; `stricttrypsin`→`Trypsin/P`, `trypsin`→`Trypsin`
MSAngel:
Parsed from **CLE** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used (normalized to a canonical enzyme name)
Parsed from **enzymes** in **digestionParameters** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used (normalized to a canonical enzyme name)
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **enzymes** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **enzyme** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **cleave_at** and **restrict** in the **database[enzyme]** section in the config
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Enzymes / Cleavage Rules: X**
Wombat: Parsed from **enzyme** (title-cased to "Trypsin" if the value is "trypsin")
i2MassChroQ:
If Sage is used: parsed from **sage_database_enzyme_cleave_at**, **sage_database_enzyme_restrict**, **sage_database_enzyme_c_terminal**
if X!Tandem is used: parsed from **protein, cleavage site**

AlphaDIA: **fixed_modifications** setting in **library_prediction** section, homogenized to ProForma-like notation (e.g. `Oxidation@M` → `M[Oxidation]`)
AlphaPept:
**mods_fixed** & **mods_fixed_terminal** & **mods_fixed_terminal_prot** in **fasta** section of the config;
known codes homogenized (e.g. `cC`→`C[Carbamidomethyl]`, `oxM`→`M[Oxidation]`, `a<^`→`N-term[Acetyl]`), others kept as-is
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--mod**, plus any **--unimodN** command tokens (for DIA-NN ≥1.8 these are all
treated as fixed mods; for <1.8, `unimod4`/`unimod35` map specifically to fixed-Carbamidomethyl/
variable-Oxidation)
--cfg: parsed from the lines **X enabled as a fixed modification** and **Modification X with mass
delta X at X will be considered as fixed**
In both cases the raw value is homogenized to ProForma-like notation via a mapping table
(e.g. `unimod4`, `UniMod:4`, `Carbamidomethyl (C)` → `C[Carbamidomethyl]`)
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.table.fix-mods**, converted to ProForma-like notation via a mass→name lookup table (falls back to the raw mass if unrecognized)
MSAngel:
Parsed from **MODS** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used
Parsed from **fixedModifications** in **modificationParameters** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used
MaxQuant: Parsed from **fixedModifications**, converted to ProForma-like notation (expands multi-residue mods, e.g. `Phospho (STY)` → `S[Phospho], T[Phospho], Y[Phospho]`; terminal qualifiers kept as-is; falls back to a small mapping table for names like `Cys-Cys`/`Cysteinyl`)
MetaMorpheus: Parsed from **CommonParameters.ListOfModsFixed**, converted from MetaMorpheus's `"{mod} on {residue}"` format to ProForma-like notation (handles Pep/Prot N-/C-term qualifiers)
PEAKS: Parsed as the elements between **Fixed Modifications:** and **Variable Modifications**
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **fixed_ptms** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **fixed_mods** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **static_mods** in the **database** section in the config, mapped to ProForma-style mod names via a mass lookup table
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from either **sage_database_static_mods** or **residue, modification mass**, depending on search engine used; both converted to ProForma-like notation via a mapping table (falls back to raw token)

AlphaDIA: **target_ms2_tolerance** setting in **search** section of the config, formatted as `[-X ppm, X ppm]`
AlphaPept: **frag_tol** in **search** section of the config, same unit logic as precursor_mass_tolerance
DIA-NN:
Value set for **--mass-acc**. If this parameter is not set, it means tolerance optimization will
be performed. In that case, as well as if --cfg is set, the value will be parsed from line
**Optimised mass accuracy: X ppm**
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.fragment_mass_tolerance** (symmetric); unit (ppm/Da) from **msfragger.fragment_mass_units**
MSAngel:
Not parsed if Mascot is used
Parsed from **fragmentIonMZTolerance** and **fragmentAccuracyType** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used
MaxQuant: Parsed from **MatchTolerance**; unit is ppm if **MatchToleranceInPpm** is true, otherwise Da
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Fragment Mass Error Tolerance: X** (falls back to 40 ppm if the value is "System Default")
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **fragment_mass_error_tolerance** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **fragment_mass_tolerance** (+ **fragment_mass_tolerance_unit**) from the json file
Spectronaut:
Set to **Dynamic**, if the calibration method is set to **Dynamic**
If the calibration method is set to **Static** or **Relative**, tolerances are extracted from line **MS2 Tolerance: X**, with Th or ppm units, respectively
i2MassChroQ:
Parsed from either **sage_fragment_tol** or **spectrum, fragment monoisotopic mass error**
(single symmetric value, not separate minus/plus), depending on search engine used

AlphaDIA: Not parsed as not an option
AlphaPept: Not parsed as not an option
DIA-NN: Not parsed as not an option
FragPipe:
If not DIA-NN quant, parsed from **phi-report.filter**
if DIA-NN quant, not parsed
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Not parsed
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **peptide_fdr**

AlphaDIA: **fdr** setting in **fdr** section of the config
DIA-NN: Not parsed as not an option (explicitly set to `None` when --cfg is used)
FragPipe:
If not DIA-NN quant, parsed from **phi-report.filter**
if DIA-NN quant, parsed from **diann.q-value**
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Protein Group FDR: X**
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed from **protein_level_fdr_cutoff** from the json file
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Protein Qvalue Cutoff (Experiment): X**
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **protein_fdr**

AlphaDIA: **fdr** setting in **fdr** section of the config
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--qvalue**
--cfg: parsed from line **Output will be filtered at X FDR**
FragPipe:
If not DIA-NN quant, parsed from **phi-report.filter**
if DIA-NN quant, parsed from **diann.q-value**
PEAKS: Parsed from either **Precursor FDR: X** or **PSM FDR: X**
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **psm_filter_expected_fdr** on **Import and filters** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **psm_level_fdr_cutoff** from the json file
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Precursor Qvalue Cutoff: X**
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **psm_fdr**

AlphaDIA: Maximum value in **fragment_mz** setting, same version-aware extraction
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **max-fr-mz** (if not provided, default = 1800)
--cfg: parsed from line **Max fragment m/z set to X**
FragPipe: Not parsed

AlphaDIA: **max_var_mod_num** setting in **library_prediction** section of the config
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **var-mods**
--cfg: parsed from line **Maximum number of variable modifications set to X**; defaults to `0`
if the line is not found
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.max_variable_mods_per_peptide**
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Max Variable PTM per Peptide: X**
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed from **max_mods** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **max_variable_mods** in the **database** section in the config
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Max Variable Modifications: X**
i2MassChroQ:
Not parsed if X!Tandem is used
parsed from **sage_database_max_variable_mods** if Sage is used

AlphaDIA: Maximum value in **precursor_len** setting, same version-aware extraction as min_peptide_length
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--max-pep-len** (if not provided, default = 30)
--cfg: parsed from the line **Max peptide length set to X**
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.digest_max_length**
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Peptide Length between: X** or **Peptide Length Range: X**
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed from **max_peptide_length** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **max_len** in the **database[enzyme]** section in the config (None if not set)
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Max Peptide Length: X**
i2MassChroQ:
Not parsed if X!Tandem is used
parsed from **sage_database_enzyme_max_len** if Sage is used

AlphaDIA: Maximum value in **precursor_charge** setting, same version-aware extraction
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **max-pr-charge** (if not provided, default = 4)
--cfg: parsed from line **Max precursor charge set to X**
FragPipe:
FragPipe uses charge state information from data, if present.
So this value is set to None by default, but overwritten using **msfragger.misc.fragger.precursor-charge-hi** if **msfragger.override_charge** is set to True
MSAngel:
Parsed from **CHARGE** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used
Parsed from **maxChargeSearched** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Precursor Charge between: X** or **Charge between: X**
ProlineStudio: Parsed as the maximal charge state found in **peptide_charge_states** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **max_precursor_charge** from the json file
Sage: Parsed as last value from **precursor_charge** list
Spectronaut:
If Peptide Charge is set to False, not parsed
If not, parsed from line **Peptide Charge: X**
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from either **sage_precursor_charge** or **spectrum, maximum parent charge**, depending on search engine used

AlphaDIA: Maximum value in **precursor_mz** setting, same version-aware extraction
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **max-pr-mz** (if not provided, default = 1800)
--cfg: parsed from line **Max precursor m/z set to X**
FragPipe: Calculated by dividing the maximum peptide mass set for digestion (**msfragger.misc.fragger.digest-mass-hi**) by the minimum precursor charge

AlphaDIA: Minimum value in **fragment_mz** setting in **library_prediction** section, same version-aware extraction
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **min-fr-mz** (if not provided, default = 200)
--cfg: parsed from line **Min fragment m/z set to X**
FragPipe: Not parsed

AlphaDIA:
Minimum value in **precursor_len** setting in **library_prediction** section of the config.
Extraction auto-detects older (<1.10) vs newer (≥1.10) AlphaDIA log formats
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--min-pep-len** (if not provided, default = 7)
--cfg: parsed from the line **Min peptide length set to X**
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.digest_min_length**
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Peptide Length between: X** or **Peptide Length Range: X**
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **psm_filter_2** on **Import and filters** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **min_peptide_length** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **min_len** in the **database[enzyme]** section in the config
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Min Peptide Length: X**
i2MassChroQ:
Not parsed if X!Tandem is used
parsed from **sage_database_enzyme_min_len** if Sage is used

AlphaDIA: Minimum value in **precursor_charge** setting, same version-aware extraction
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **min-pr-charge** (if not provided, default = 1)
--cfg: parsed from line **Min precursor charge set to X**
FragPipe:
FragPipe uses charge state information from data, if present.
So this value is set to 1 by default, but overwritten using **msfragger.misc.fragger.precursor-charge-lo** if **msfragger.override_charge** is set to True
MSAngel:
Parsed from **CHARGE** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used
Parsed from **minChargeSearched** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Precursor Charge between: X** or **Charge between: X**
ProlineStudio: Parsed as the minimal charge state found in **peptide_charge_states** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **min_precursor_charge** from the json file
Sage: Parsed as first value from **precursor_charge** list
Spectronaut:
If Peptide Charge is set to False, not parsed
If not, parsed from line **Peptide Charge: X**
i2MassChroQ:
Not parsed if X!Tandem is used
parsed from **sage_precursor_charge** if Sage is used

AlphaDIA: Minimum value in **precursor_mz** setting in **library_prediction** section, same version-aware extraction
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **min-pr-mz** (if not provided, default = 300)
--cfg: parsed from line **Min precursor m/z set to X**
FragPipe: Calculated by dividing the minimum peptide mass set for digestion (**msfragger.misc.fragger.digest-mass-lo**) by the maximum precursor charge

AlphaDIA: **target_ms1_tolerance** setting in **search** section of the config, formatted as `[-X ppm, X ppm]`
AlphaPept: **prec_tol** in **search** section of the config; unit is ppm if **ppm** flag (search section) is True, else Da; formatted as `[-X <unit>, X <unit>]`
DIA-NN:
Value set for **--mass-acc-ms1**. If this parameter is not set, it means tolerance optimization
will be performed. In that case, as well as if --cfg is set, the value will be parsed from the first
occurence of the line **Recommended MS1 mass accuracy setting: X ppm**
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.precursor_mass_lower** and **msfragger.precursor_mass_upper**; unit (ppm/Da) from **msfragger.precursor_mass_units**
MSAngel:
Parsed from **TOL** and **TOLU** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used
Parsed from **precursorTolerance** and **precursorAccuracyType** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used
MetaMorpheus: Parsed from **CommonParameters.PrecursorMassTolerance** (e.g. `"±20.0000 PPM"`), formatted as `[-X ppm, X ppm]` or `[-X Da, X Da]`
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Precursor Mass Error Tolerance: X** (falls back to 40 ppm if the value is "System Default")
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **peptide_mass_error_tolerance** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **precursor_mass_tolerance** (+ **precursor_mass_tolerance_unit**) from the json file
Spectronaut:
Set to **Dynamic**, if the calibration method is set to **Dynamic**
If the calibration method is set to **Static** or **Relative**, tolerances are extracted from line **MS1 Tolerance: X**, with Th or ppm units, respectively (resolved within the tolerance section matching the instrument's **Vendor**)
i2MassChroQ:
Parsed from either **sage_precursor_tol** or **spectrum, parent monoisotopic mass error minus/plus**,
depending on search engine used

AlphaDIA: AlphaPeptDeep (fixed)
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: either **DIA-NN** if **--predictor** is set, or **User defined speclib** if **--lib** is set to a path
--cfg: since --lib/--predictor aren't visible on the command line, falls back to the log body:
**Deep learning will be used to generate a new in silico spectral library** → DIA-NN;
a subsequent **Loading spectral library** line without that message → User defined speclib
Internally stored per RT/IM/MS2_int, flattened to a single string by post-processing
FragPipe: If DIA-NN quant and **diann.library** is set, `"User defined speclib"`; if DIA-NN quant and unset, `"DIANN"`; otherwise not parsed
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Not parsed
i2MassChroQ: Not parsed

AlphaDIA: **inference_strategy** in **fdr** section of the config
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--pg-level** or **--no-prot-inf** (→ `Disabled`), with the mapping
{**0**: `Isoforms`, **1**: `Protein_names`, **2**: `Genes`}; defaults to `Genes` if unset
--cfg: parsed from line **Implicit protein grouping: X**, mapped via {isoform IDs, protein names, genes};
defaults to `Genes` if not matched
FragPipe: If **protein-prophet.run-protein-prophet** is true, parsed from **protein-prophet.cmd-opts** (prefixed `"ProteinProphet: "`)
MetaMorpheus: `Parsimony` if **SearchParameters.DoParsimony** is True, otherwise not parsed (`None`)
ProlineStudio: Parsed from the row containing **"peptides selection method"** on the **Quant config** sheet (lowercased); not parsed if that row is absent
QuantMS: Parsed from **protein_inference_method** from the json file
i2MassChroQ: Not parsed

AlphaDIA: DirectLFQ (fixed)
AlphaPept: **lfq_ratio_min**, **max_lfq** & **mode** in **quantification** section of the config (optional section), combined into a dict then flattened to a human-readable string
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: either **Legacy** (if --direct-quant set), **QuantUMS high-accuracy** if --high-acc set,
or **QuantUMS high-precision** (default)
--cfg: parsed from line **X quantification mode** (last match used); defaults to `QuantUMS high-precision`
if not found
FragPipe:
If not DIA-NN quant, not parsed (TODO)
if DIA-NN quant, parsed from **diann.quantification-strategy**
MSAngel: Parsed from **quantMethod** type in the **quantitationConfig** section (both Mascot and X!Tandem)
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed from **quantification_method** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **lfq_settings** in the **quant** section in the config
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **Quantity MS Level: X**
i2MassChroQ: Not parsed

InstaNovo: Explicitly set to `None` (not present in InstaNovo's config)

AlphaDIA: Not parsed
DIA-NN:
Parsed from line **Scan window radius set to X** (always taken from the log body, both with and
without --cfg)
FragPipe: Not parsed
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Not parsed
Spectronaut: Parsed from line **XIC IM Extraction Window: X**
i2MassChroQ: Not parsed

AlphaDIA: AlphaDIA (fixed)
DIA-NN: DIA-NN (fixed)
FragPipe: MSFragger (fixed)
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **software_name** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed as a list of all the search engines found under the keys in the yml file that start with **SEARCHENGINE** (only **comet** and **msgf** are currently recognized; any other engine name raises an error)
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **AnalysisSoftware_name** (X!Tandem path normalizes `"X! "` → `"X!"`)

AlphaDIA: Not parsed as no difference with software_version
DIA-NN: Parsed from log file header
FragPipe: Parsed from **# MSFragger version** comment line, or extracted from the MSFragger jar filename in **fragpipe-config.bin-msfragger** (regex `MSFragger-(.+)\.jar`)
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **software_version** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed as a list of the versions of all the search engines under the keys in the yml file that start with **SEARCHENGINE**
Wombat: Not parsed (assignment present in source but commented out)
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **AnalysisSoftware_version**

AlphaDIA: Not parsed
DIA-NN: Not parsed
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.num_enzyme_termini** (True unless the value is `"2"`)
MSAID*: Parsed from **Enzyme Specificity** (True unless the value is `"full"`)
MaxQuant: Parsed from **enzymeMode** (False only if mode = 0, i.e. "Fully specific")
MetaMorpheus: Parsed from **CommonParameters.DigestionParams.FragmentationTerminus** (True unless the value is `"Both"`)
PEAKS: Parsed from line **Digest Mode: X** (True unless the value is `"Specific"`)
ProlineStudio: Not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed from **num_enzyme_termini** from the json file (True if not equal to `"fully"`)
Sage: Parsed from **semi_enzymatic** in the **database[enzyme]** section in the config (bool; `null` → False)

AlphaDIA: AlphaDIA (fixed)
DIA-NN: DIA-NN (fixed)
FragPipe: Either FragPipe or FragPipe (DIA-NN quant), depending on input
ProlineStudio: ProlineStudio (fixed)
QuantMS: quantms (fixed)
i2MassChroQ: i2MassChroQ (fixed)

AlphaDIA: Parsed from the first **version** key-value line in the log
DIA-NN: Parsed from log file header
FragPipe: Parsed from **# FragPipe version** comment line if present; otherwise from the header line via regex `FragPipe \((\d+\.\d+.*)\)`
MetaMorpheus: Parsed from the third whitespace-separated token of the version file's first line
ProlineStudio: If there is a **Dataset statistics and infos** sheet, it is parsed from **version**, otherwise not parsed
QuantMS: Parsed as the bigbio or nf-core/quantms version from the yml file
i2MassChroQ: Parsed from **i2MassChroQ_VERSION**

AlphaDIA: **variable_modifications** setting in **library_prediction** section, homogenized to ProForma-like notation
AlphaPept: **mods_variable** & **mods_variable_terminal** & **mods_variable_terminal_prot** in **fasta** section of the config; same homogenization as fixed_mods
DIA-NN:
No --cfg: value set for **--var-mod**
--cfg: parsed from line **Modification X with mass delta X at X will be considered as variable**
Homogenized to ProForma-like notation via the same mapping table
FragPipe: Parsed from **msfragger.table.var-mods**, same ProForma conversion as fixed_mods (also handles peptide/protein N-term notations)
MSAngel:
Parsed from **IT_MODS** in the **paramMap** section if Mascot is used
Parsed from **variableModifications** in **modificationParameters** in the **paramMap** section if X!Tandem is used.
Special parsing of the **data** section if proteinQuickAcetyl and/or quickPyrolidone are toggled
MaxQuant: Parsed from **variableModifications**, same ProForma conversion as fixed_mods
MetaMorpheus: Parsed from **CommonParameters.ListOfModsVariable**, same conversion as fixed_mods
PEAKS: Parsed as the elements between **Variable Modifications:** and **Database:**
ProlineStudio: Parsed from **variable_ptms** on **Search settings and infos** sheet
QuantMS: Parsed from **variable_mods** from the json file
Sage: Parsed from **variable_mods** in the **database** section in the config, mapped to ProForma-style mod names via a mass lookup table
i2MassChroQ:
Parsed from either **sage_database_variable_mods** or **residue, potential modification mass**, depending on search engine used, with same ProForma conversion.
For X!Tandem, also appends `Acetyl(N-term)` if **protein, quick acetyl** = `"yes"` and `Pyrolidone(N-term)` if **protein, quick pyrolidone** = `"yes"`
